homepage.heroSubline: Expert tree care services for Oklahoma City and surrounding areas. Protecting your property and enhancing its beauty.
aboutText: Complete Tree Service started as a small family operation with a passion for trees and a commitment to our community. Over a decade later, we've grown into a trusted name in Oklahoma City for providing comprehensive tree care solutions.

We believe in a proactive approach to tree care, focusing on preventative maintenance to ensure the long-term health and vitality of your trees. Our team is dedicated to providing honest assessments and sustainable solutions tailored to your specific needs.

We're proud to be a local business invested in the well-being of our community. We actively participate in local initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact through responsible tree care practices.

services.name: Tree Trimming & Pruning
services.shortDescription: Enhance the health and beauty of your trees with our professional trimming and pruning services.
services.description:
Proper tree trimming and pruning are essential for maintaining the health, safety, and aesthetics of your trees. Our certified arborists understand the specific needs of Oklahoma City's diverse tree species and utilize industry-best practices to promote healthy growth and prevent potential hazards. We carefully assess each tree to determine the appropriate pruning techniques, whether it's removing dead or diseased branches, thinning the crown for better air circulation, or shaping the tree for optimal form. 

Our tree trimming services can also help improve the overall appearance of your property and increase its value. We can remove branches that are obstructing views, interfering with power lines, or encroaching on buildings. We are especially mindful of the challenges presented by Oklahoma's climate, including the potential for ice storms, and will prune your trees to minimize the risk of damage. We adhere to all safety regulations and use specialized equipment to ensure a safe and efficient trimming process. 

We can create a scheduled maintenance plan to ensure your trees remain healthy and beautiful for years to come. Contact us today to schedule a consultation and learn more about our tree trimming and pruning services.
process: Step 1: Thorough assessment of the tree's health and structure.
Step 2: Develop a customized pruning plan based on the tree's specific needs.
Step 3: Precise trimming and pruning using appropriate techniques.
Step 4: Removal of debris and proper disposal of branches.
benefits: Enhanced safety and reduced risk of damage
Increased property value and curb appeal
Prevention of disease and pest infestations

faq.question: How often should I have my trees trimmed?
faq.answer: The frequency of tree trimming depends on the species, age, and health of the tree. Generally, mature trees should be trimmed every 3-5 years, while younger trees may require more frequent pruning to establish a strong structure.

faq.question: What is the best time of year to prune my trees in Oklahoma City?
faq.answer: The best time to prune most trees in Oklahoma City is during the dormant season, typically late winter or early spring. This allows the tree to heal quickly and promotes vigorous growth in the spring.

faq.question: Do you offer storm damage cleanup?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide 24/7 emergency storm damage cleanup services. Our team is equipped to safely and efficiently remove fallen trees and branches, minimizing further damage to your property.

services.name: Tree Removal
services.shortDescription: Safe and efficient tree removal services for hazardous or unwanted trees.
services.description:
Tree removal is a complex and potentially dangerous task that should only be performed by experienced professionals. At Complete Tree Service, we have the expertise, equipment, and insurance to safely and efficiently remove trees of all sizes and species. We understand that tree removal is often a last resort, and we carefully assess each situation to determine if alternative solutions, such as tree trimming or cabling, are possible. 

However, there are times when tree removal is necessary, such as when a tree is dead, diseased, or poses a significant safety hazard. We can safely remove trees that are close to buildings, power lines, or other structures. Our team is trained in advanced rigging techniques and uses specialized equipment to minimize the risk of damage to your property. We carefully plan each removal project, taking into account the surrounding environment and potential obstacles. 

After the tree is removed, we can also grind the stump and remove the debris, leaving your property clean and ready for replanting or landscaping. We adhere to all local regulations and ensure that the removal process is environmentally responsible. Contact us today to schedule a consultation and learn more about our tree removal services.
process: Step 1: Thorough assessment of the tree and surrounding area.
Step 2: Development of a safe and efficient removal plan.
Step 3: Careful removal of the tree using specialized equipment.
Step 4: Stump grinding and debris removal (optional).
benefits: Improved aesthetics and increased property value
Protection of surrounding trees and vegetation

faq.question: How much does tree removal cost?
faq.answer: The cost of tree removal varies depending on several factors, including the size, species, and location of the tree, as well as the complexity of the removal process. We provide free, no-obligation estimates with transparent pricing.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to remove a tree on my property?
faq.answer: The need for a permit depends on local regulations. We can help you determine if a permit is required and assist with the application process.

faq.question: Can you remove a tree that is close to power lines?
faq.answer: Yes, we are experienced in removing trees that are close to power lines. We work closely with utility companies to ensure the safety of our team and the surrounding area.

services.name: Stump Grinding & Removal
services.shortDescription: Remove unsightly tree stumps and reclaim your yard with our professional stump grinding services.
services.description:
After a tree is removed, the remaining stump can be an eyesore and a potential hazard. Stump grinding is the most efficient and cost-effective way to remove these stumps and reclaim your yard. At Complete Tree Service, we use specialized stump grinding equipment to grind the stump below ground level, allowing you to replant grass, install landscaping, or build on the area. 

Our stump grinding services are safe, efficient, and environmentally friendly. We take precautions to protect your property and minimize disruption to your landscaping. We can grind stumps of all sizes and species, even those that are close to buildings or other structures. After the stump is ground, we remove the debris and fill the hole with topsoil, leaving your yard clean and ready for use. 

We also offer complete stump removal services, which involve digging out the entire stump and root system. This is a more labor-intensive process, but it may be necessary in certain situations, such as when a large stump is located in a high-traffic area or when you want to completely eliminate the risk of regrowth. Contact us today to schedule a consultation and learn more about our stump grinding and removal services.
process: Step 1: Assessment of the stump and surrounding area.
Step 2: Grinding of the stump below ground level.
Step 3: Removal of debris and filling of the hole with topsoil.
Step 4: Optional complete stump removal (digging out the entire stump and root system).

faq.question: How long does stump grinding take?
faq.answer: The time it takes to grind a stump depends on its size and species. Most stumps can be ground in a few hours.

faq.question: Will stump grinding damage my lawn?
faq.answer: We take precautions to protect your lawn during the stump grinding process. We use mats to prevent damage from the equipment and clean up all debris after the job is complete.

faq.question: What do you do with the stump grindings?
faq.answer: We can either remove the stump grindings or leave them for you to use as mulch or compost.

services.name: Emergency Tree Service
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency tree service for storm damage, fallen trees, and other urgent situations.
services.description:
Oklahoma City is no stranger to severe weather, and storms can cause significant damage to trees. Fallen trees and branches can block driveways, damage property, and pose a serious safety hazard. At Complete Tree Service, we offer 24/7 emergency tree service to address these urgent situations. Our team is equipped to safely and efficiently remove fallen trees and branches, clear debris, and minimize further damage to your property. 

We understand that emergency situations can be stressful, and we strive to provide prompt and reliable service. We will assess the damage, develop a safe removal plan, and work quickly to restore your property to its pre-storm condition. We are experienced in working with insurance companies and can provide documentation to support your claim. 

Whether you have a fallen tree blocking your driveway or a hazardous branch threatening your home, don't hesitate to call us for emergency tree service. We are here to help you 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. We understand the unique challenges that Oklahoma's climate presents, from ice storms to high winds, and we are prepared to handle any tree-related emergency.
process: Step 1: Prompt response to your emergency call.
Step 2: Rapid assessment of the damage and development of a safe removal plan.
Step 3: Safe and efficient removal of fallen trees and branches.
Step 4: Debris removal and property restoration.
benefits: Peace of mind during stressful times

faq.question: What should I do if a tree falls on my house?
faq.answer: If a tree falls on your house, immediately evacuate the building and call 911. Then, call us for emergency tree service. Do not attempt to remove the tree yourself.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency call?
faq.answer: We strive to respond to emergency calls as quickly as possible. Our response time depends on our current workload and the location of your property, but we will typically arrive within a few hours.

faq.question: Do you work with insurance companies?
faq.answer: Yes, we are experienced in working with insurance companies and can provide documentation to support your claim.

services.name: Tree Planting
services.shortDescription: Enhance your landscape with our professional tree planting services.
services.description:
Planting a tree is an investment in the future. A well-chosen and properly planted tree can provide shade, beauty, and environmental benefits for generations to come. At Complete Tree Service, we offer professional tree planting services to help you select the right tree for your property and ensure its long-term health. We understand the unique challenges of planting trees in Oklahoma City's clay soil and hot climate, and we take the necessary steps to ensure that your new tree thrives. 

We can help you choose the right tree species based on your soil conditions, sunlight exposure, and aesthetic preferences. We source our trees from reputable nurseries and ensure that they are healthy and disease-free. We carefully prepare the planting site, amending the soil as needed to provide the best possible growing conditions. We also provide ongoing care and maintenance tips to help you keep your new tree healthy and strong. 

From selecting the perfect tree to ensuring its proper planting and care, we are here to help you create a beautiful and sustainable landscape. Contact us today to schedule a consultation and learn more about our tree planting services.
process: Step 1: Consultation to discuss your needs and preferences.
Step 2: Selection of the right tree species for your property.
Step 3: Careful preparation of the planting site.
Step 4: Proper planting techniques to ensure long-term health.
benefits: Increased property value and curb appeal
Shade and cooling during hot Oklahoma summers
Environmental benefits, such as improved air quality

faq.question: What is the best time of year to plant a tree in Oklahoma City?
faq.answer: The best time to plant a tree in Oklahoma City is during the fall or early spring, when the weather is mild and the soil is moist.

faq.question: What type of soil do trees need in Oklahoma City?
faq.answer: Oklahoma City's clay soil can be challenging for trees. It's important to amend the soil with organic matter to improve drainage and aeration.

faq.question: How much should I water a newly planted tree?
faq.answer: Water newly planted trees deeply and regularly, especially during the first few months. Check the soil moisture regularly and water when the top inch is dry.

services.name: Tree Disease & Pest Management
services.shortDescription: Protect your trees from disease and pests with our expert management services.
services.description:
Oklahoma City's trees are susceptible to a variety of diseases and pests, which can weaken or even kill them. Early detection and proactive management are essential for protecting your trees and maintaining their health. At Complete Tree Service, we offer expert tree disease and pest management services to diagnose and treat a wide range of problems. 

Our certified arborists are trained to identify common tree diseases and pests in Oklahoma City, such as oak wilt, emerald ash borer, and bagworms. We use a variety of treatment methods, including preventative sprays, soil injections, and trunk injections, to control diseases and pests and prevent further damage. We also provide advice on proper tree care practices to help you keep your trees healthy and resistant to disease and pests. 

We believe in a proactive approach to tree health. We will inspect your trees regularly, identify potential problems early, and recommend appropriate treatment options. Our goal is to help you protect your investment in your trees and ensure their long-term health and beauty. Contact us today to schedule a consultation and learn more about our tree disease and pest management services.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection of your trees to identify diseases and pests.
Step 2: Accurate diagnosis of the problem.
Step 3: Development of a customized treatment plan.
Step 4: Application of appropriate treatment methods.
benefits: Protection of your trees from disease and pests
Peace of mind knowing your trees are protected

faq.question: How do I know if my tree has a disease or pest problem?
faq.answer: Signs of tree disease or pest problems include discolored leaves, wilting, stunted growth, holes in leaves or bark, and the presence of insects or other pests.

faq.question: What is oak wilt?
faq.answer: Oak wilt is a fungal disease that can kill oak trees quickly. It is spread by insects and through root grafts. Symptoms include wilting and browning of leaves, followed by rapid death of the tree.

faq.question: How can I prevent tree diseases and pests?
faq.answer: Proper tree care practices, such as watering, fertilizing, and pruning, can help prevent tree diseases and pests. Regular inspections by a certified arborist can also help identify problems early.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Complete Tree Service did an excellent job trimming our large oak tree. They were professional, efficient, and left our yard clean. The tree looks so much better now!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We had a large, dead tree that needed to be removed. Complete Tree Service provided a competitive quote and completed the job safely and efficiently. I would definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: I was very happy with the stump grinding service I received. The crew arrived on time, ground the stump quickly, and cleaned up the area. I can finally plant grass where the stump used to be!

reviews.name: Michael L.
reviews.text: After a severe storm, a large branch fell on our car. Complete Tree Service responded quickly and removed the branch safely. They were a lifesaver!

reviews.name: Jessica P.
reviews.text: Complete Tree Service helped us choose and plant a beautiful maple tree in our backyard. They provided helpful advice on how to care for the tree and ensure its long-term health.

reviews.name: Robert S.
reviews.text: I was concerned about the health of my oak tree. Complete Tree Service diagnosed the problem and provided effective treatment. My tree is now thriving!
